since_last: 53% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.02%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +1.12% · Gold +0.63% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 53% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.02%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.02%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.62%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +16.26%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +16.26%, QCOM +11.83%, AMAT +6.50%, LRCX +6.32%, ARM +5.97%. Laggards: BABA -2.83%, CRM -1.51%, BIDU -1.48%, NOW -1.33%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.12% at $156.27
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.12% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
